programme.title: The Fine Art Auction - Live!
programme.desc: Bid on works from the masters to modern contemporary art, all at unbelievable auction prices!

programme.title: Mercy Ships
programme.desc: Mercy Ship's crew of world class medical volunteers sail across the globe providing lifesaving surgeries to those with nowhere else to turn.

programme.title: 1776 Gold Rare Coin
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of American Freedom with this Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM. Encapsulated in a 1 of 250 40th Anniversary holder with the First Day of Issue designation, this is a once in a lifetime American coin!

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: 1776 Rare Silver
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of the USA with the limited edition dual date 1776-2026 Liberty Bell Privy Silver Eagle graded perfect PF70UCAM with the First Day of Issue designation. Limited to just 500,000 examples, this is a one of a kind rarity!

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the Set of 20 Truly Historic Morgan Silver Dollars in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection today. With only about 1% of all Morgan Dollars grading in uncirculated condition, examples like these are Condition Rarities.

programme.title: 1776 USA Gold Rarity
programme.desc: Secure a 1oz Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM in a 1 of 250 Holder, honoring 250 years of American Freedom! Included as a bonus is a free 2026 1oz Silver Eagle also featuring the iconic Liberty Bell to create a one of a kind pair!

programme.title: FIS Cross-Country Skiing World Cup
programme.desc: Coverage of the annual cross-country skiing competition.

programme.title: CNBC Cures: Defying Rare Disease
programme.desc: CNBC's Becky Quick steps out from behind the anchor desk to share her family's private battle with her daughter's rare disease; through her story and others like it, Quick reveals the challenges facing families trapped between breakthrough science and funding gaps.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Scammers blow up a house for insurance money, but end up engulfing dozens of homes in flames and killing a young couple.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: As the opioid epidemic destroys the lives of millions of Americans, billionaire drug mogul John Kapoor looks to cash in; he concocts a conspiracy to bribe doctors and lie to insurers to sell as much fentanyl as possible.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: With his long beard, ponytail, and ubiquitous advertising, Jamie Balagia - AKA The DWI Dude - is well-known in Texas as a flamboyant defense attorney who can get drunk driving defendants out of a jam.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Karl Karlsen is a hardworking man with what seems to be a terrible streak of bad luck, as his wife and son both die in accidents nearly 20 years apart; Karl has a secret: their suspicious deaths have been keeping his bank account full.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Using powers of persuasion, along with classic multilevel marketing techniques; amassing thousands of followers -- many of them rich and famous -- and hundreds of millions of dollars in contributions.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Mike The Situation Sorrentino flaunts washboard abs and a party boy image, but when it comes to paying his taxes, he'd rather play than pay.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A femme fatale, with a way of getting men to do what she wants, sets a trap for a multi-millionaire divorcee.
